Blocks.Text: AU res 15+ & can take overseas travel prize/s June/July 26 (exact dates TBC). Starts 2/2/26 & ends 31/3/26 11.59pm AEDT. If <18, get parent OK & if you win parent awarded prize & parent must be
companion for travel prizes. Max 3 entries p/person p/day & max 1 entry p/Qualifying Purchase & p/unique code. Max 1 major prize p/person (excl SA). Keep unique code/s. All draws: 12pm AEST
7/4/26. Other prizes incl. e-vouchers & Coca-Cola X FIFA merch. See www.coca-cola.com/au/en/offerings/fifa-2026 for full Ts&Cs incl. Qualifying Purchase products & prize details. Promoter: Coca-
Cola South Pacific Pty Ltd ABN 50 003 029 794, L9/40 Mount St, North Syd 2060. Permits: ACT TP25/01811, SA T25/1347, NSW TP/01300. © 2026 The Coca-Cola Company.
